body.title: CLOSED: Convert workflow doc to MD for external reference
body.result: Converted Confluence MIME/HTML export to 621-line Markdown; written to lab/docs/workflow_reference.md in ADC; pushed eca5e84
body.description:
Convert the Deterministic AI Development + Levers workflow summary from .doc format to Markdown and place it in the ADC repo (lab/docs/ or similar). This becomes the canonical external documentation for how CC and Igor collaborate, accommodating each agent's strengths/weaknesses, and serves as reference for the skills catalog.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/lab/docs/workflow_reference.md (output)
**Design rules:** documentation-only change; no code or executable logic
**Scope boundary:** Convert the content from .doc to clean Markdown with proper heading hierarchy and sections. Do NOT redesign the content or structure — preserve the original organization. Verify the file is readable and complete in the repo.
**Test plan:** Read the converted .md file, verify all major sections are present, render it in a Markdown viewer to confirm formatting, link it from ADC's README or docs index if appropriate.
